font_family.heading: Plus Jakarta Sans, sans-serif
font_family.body: DM Sans, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

layout.structure: Single-column layout with distinct card-based sections. Max-width 800px for form readability.
layout.navigation: Sticky header with progress indication or simple branding.

buttons.base: h-12 px-6 font-bold transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95
buttons.primary: bg-[#0e6b63] text-white hover:bg-[#0d5a54] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md rounded-[12px] font-bold
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#e0d9cf] text-[#3d4a5c] hover:border-[#0e6b63] hover:text-[#0e6b63] rounded-[12px] font-bold

inputs.base: h-12 px-4 bg-white border border-[#e0d9cf] focus:border-[#0e6b63] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0e6b63]/20 transition-all outline-none placeholder:text-[#8892a4] font-body

cards.base: bg-white border border-[#e0d9cf] rounded-[20px] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

activity_toggles.item: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 border-2 border-[#e0d9cf] rounded-[20px] cursor-pointer transition-all hover:border-[#0e6b63]/50

visual_enhancers.motion: Use 'framer-motion' for smooth section entry (opacity: 0 -> 1, y: 20 -> 0).
visual_enhancers.illustrations: Use clean, minimalist SVG icons or Lucide icons for activities. Avoid cluttered stock photos.

universal_guidelines: Background: cream warm #f5f0e8 — never cold grays.
Primary color: #0e6b63 (teal foncé de la landing page).
Headings: Plus Jakarta Sans, font-weight 800, letter-spacing -0.025em.
Ensure high contrast for text (use the provided #1a1f2e for primary text).
Use generous padding inside cards (p-6 or p-8) to avoid a cramped look.
Input fields should have a height of 48px (h-12) for better touch targets.
Feedback is key: Show success toast after saving.
